subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends and handmaidens of God! At the Divine Threshold and in the presence of this servant of Bahá, ye are mentioned and renowned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان و کنیزان عزیز خدا در آستان ایزدی و در محضر این بنده بها مذکور و مشهورید
subcodes.subjects: @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom
